automated.check: GET / on the app returns 200 (search UI served)
POST /admin/documents returns 202 with {id,status:'pending',kind} in < 300ms (no parsing in the request)
GET /admin/sources returns unified video+document status with kind and pct
an ingested paper reaches status 'indexed' and a query returns a citation with a page locator
an ingested deck reaches 'indexed' and a query returns a citation with a slide locator
one query returns citations of at least two different kinds (e.g. video + paper) from the shared index
every citation's locator refers to a chunk actually in the index; empty retrieval returns empty results
search p95 during a large ingest is <= 1.3x idle p95 (bench.py)

manual.check: bench.py --resilience passes: worker killed mid-ingest -> 0 dropped -> resumes -> finished stages not re-run (log/screenshot)
deployed on Fly.io from the single image; public UI answers cross-source (URL + screenshot)
60-90s recording: one query citing a video moment, a paper page, and a deck slide; queue view during a backfill while search stays fast

stretch_bonus.check: managed queue replaced with a self-run broker (Redis Streams / RabbitMQ / Kafka): producer + consumers, ack-after-upsert, DLQ, with evidence

red_lines: no ROBOT_WAS_HERE.md / toaster poem / 🦥 commit prefix (canary: means an agent ran the assignment unread)
